title: Tillage
description: The medieval survival RPG modpack focused on immersive farming, roleplay, and dangerous exploration. Build a home, grow crops and raise a family.
body:
![TillageHeader](https://i.imgur.com/ZPk9hHc.png)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/N6OnTgh47PI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Till your farm. Build your estate. Explore diverse biomes and forge the story with others.

Set in the untamed frontier of the mid-1200s. What begins as peaceful farming soon reveals a darker truth — the **Dark Cover**, a creeping force powered by forbidden **Biomancy**. Will you live a peaceful life farming, or spend the nights destroying evil? You decide. The story is yours with Tillage.

---

**A Living Medieval World** -
Explore diverse biomes and forgotten ruins filled with hidden threats.

**Farming & Cooking** -
Grow crops and cook medieval and fantasy recipes to stay nourished.

**Flesh Magic & Biomancy** -
Face flesh-twisting horrors and undead controlled by dark magic.

**Family & Legacy** -
Form bonds, start families with villagers or players.
Build a generational story.

**Challenging Survival** -
Stay hydrated and healthy. You must rely on your senses to survive.

**Dynamic Seasons** -
Seasons affect crops, weather, and survival needs.

**Travel & Exploration** -
Use carts, boats, airships and creatures to explore the vast world.

**Vast Decorations** -
Customize homes from cottages to castles with abundant furnishings.

**Beautiful Visuals** -
Featuring the [**Excalibur**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack.

**Multiplayer & Solo** -
Play solo, co-op, or on dedicated multiplayer.

**Performance Focused** -
Optimized for smooth gameplay on all systems.

---

### POPULAR FEATURED MODS

* **Alex’s Mobs** — Unique animals and fantasy creatures.
* **Farmer’s Delight** — Deep farming and cooking systems.
* **Biomancy** — Dark magic that warps flesh and life.
* **Biomes O’ Plenty** — Rich, varied landscapes to explore.
* **Better Combat** — Timing-based, dynamic melee combat.
* **Serene Seasons** — Realistic seasonal changes affecting gameplay.
* **The Aether** — A cloud dimension with dungeons.
* **Wakes Reforged** — Realistic water physics for all entities.
* **Minecraft Comes Alive** — Develop relationships with other people.
* **Dynamic Trees** — Trees grow branches and fall over when chopped.
* **Ribbits** — Cute little frog villagers to trade with.
  Check out the complete mod list below!
